claim: World Bank estimates that electrification for productive use in agriculture can increase rural incomes by 20-30 percent, but fewer than 10 percent of mini-grids in SSA serve productive-use customers.

source.title: Productive Uses of Energy for Rural Development

method: Reviewed World Bank productive-use framework, income-impact estimates, and mini-grid survey data.
limitations: Productive-use data depends on enterprise surveys.
